title: eriosema nutans
intro: Eriosema nutans, also known as the nodding bean or sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Eriosema nutans has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. The plant's leaves and pods are often used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and infusions in the form of teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
